summary: Admin Settings Testing Complete - All 10 backend API tests passed. Mining Formula, Contact Settings, and Logo Upload features verified working correctly. Frontend pages load with all tabs and file upload UI for logos.
critical_code_review_comments: Mining Settings API correctly saves and retrieves base_rate, vip_multiplier, max_daily_mining_hours, prc_to_inr_ratio
Contact Settings API correctly saves all fields including company_name, country, email_business, working_hours
Logo Upload API correctly processes images, resizes them, saves to /app/frontend/public/uploads/, and updates logo_settings in database
All settings use upsert=True for MongoDB updates ensuring settings document is created if not exists

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly with proper tabs and functionality)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - test data is created and restored during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Settings fully tested. Routes are /admin/settings/system (System Settings with VIP Plans, Mining Formula, Referral Bonus, Registration Control, Service Charges tabs) and /admin/settings/web (Web Settings with Policy Editor, Address Settings, Phone & Email, Logo & Branding tabs). Logo upload uses file upload UI instead of URL input. Test file /app/tests/test_admin_settings.py covers all CRUD operations for mining-settings, contact-settings, logo-settings, and logo-upload APIs.

TestMiningSettings.test_get_mining_settings: PASSED - Returns base_rate, vip_multiplier, max_daily_mining_hours, prc_to_inr_ratio
TestMiningSettings.test_post_mining_settings_and_verify_per: PASSED - Settings save and persist correctly after refresh

TestContactSettings.test_get_contact_settings: PASSED - Returns all contact fields including company_name, country, email_business, working_hours
TestContactSettings.test_post_contact_settings_and_verify_pe: PASSED - Settings save and persist correctly after refresh

TestLogoSettings.test_get_logo_settings: PASSED - Returns logo_url, footer_logo_url, favicon_url, app_name, tagline
TestLogoSettings.test_post_logo_settings_and_verify_persi: PASSED - Settings save and persist correctly

TestLogoUpload.test_logo_upload_main_logo: PASSED - File upload works, returns URL in /uploads/ directory
TestLogoUpload.test_logo_upload_footer_logo: PASSED - Footer logo upload works correctly
TestLogoUpload.test_logo_upload_updates_settings: PASSED - Upload automatically updates logo_settings in database

AdminSystemSettings.tabs: PASSED - VIP Plans, Mining Formula, Referral Bonus, Registration Control, Service Charges tabs present
AdminSystemSettings.mining_formula_tab: PASSED - Shows Base Mining Rate, VIP Multiplier, Max Daily Mining Hours, PRC to INR Ratio inputs
AdminSystemSettings.save_button: PASSED - Save Mining Settings button present

AdminWebSettings.tabs: PASSED - Policy Editor, Address Settings, Phone & Email, Logo & Branding tabs present
AdminWebSettings.phone_email_tab: PASSED - Shows Primary Phone, Secondary Phone, Support Email, Business Email, Working Hours inputs
AdminWebSettings.logo_branding_tab: PASSED - Shows App Name, Tagline inputs and 3 file upload sections (Main Logo, Footer Logo, Favicon)
AdminWebSettings.file_upload_ui: PASSED - Uses file upload buttons instead of URL input fields as requested
